since_last: 45% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.91% · BTC -2.28% · Gold -0.79% · Nasdaq100 -2.42%. 45% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.20%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.20%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -9.82%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.29%, NOW +4.11%, OKLO +3.60%, OKLO +3.60%, SAP +3.34%. Laggards: MU -9.82%, LRCX -9.63%, KLAC -9.52%, VRT -9.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.49% at $158.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
